steps.t: The stolen food can be found at Lhan Gogledh, north of Lhucu's hut. Lhucu has asked you to recover the stolen food for the people of Lhan Bach.
Lhucu is at her hut, south of Lhan Gogledh. You should bring the food-stores to Lhucu so that she may redistribute them to the people of Lhan Bach.
